rationale.avg_points_efficiency: Highest weight because the model should favor races that have historically turned field quality into points efficiently.
rationale.avg_stage_top10_points: Adds stage-race scoring depth without letting stage volume dominate the entire ranking.
rationale.avg_top10_points: Rewards broad scoring opportunity instead of only winner upside.
rationale.avg_winner_points: Keeps a smaller reward for races with real ceiling if the team lands a big result.
rationale.field_softness_score: Rewards races whose historical top end has looked softer for the points on offer.

team_profile.execution_rule_rationale: Execution multipliers are conservative realization haircuts by race category. Bigger races keep a lower multiplier because historical opportunity does not fully translate into team-level realized points.

participation_rule_rationale.calendar_seed: The planning calendar alone is a weaker signal, so future starts get a haircut.
participation_rule_rationale.completed: Completed races get full participation confidence because the team actually started.
participation_rule_rationale.observed_startlist: Observed startlists are nearly as strong as a program-confirmed entry.
participation_rule_rationale.overlap_penalty: When races overlap, confidence is capped because a team cannot fully commit to both.
participation_rule_rationale.program_confirmed: A live team program listing is strong evidence, but still below a completed race.

strength_weight_rationale.all_round: How much the profile should reward balanced, all-round stage-race opportunity.
strength_weight_rationale.gc: How much the profile should care about GC-heavy stage-race opportunity.
strength_weight_rationale.one_day: How much the team profile should care about classic-style one-day signals.
strength_weight_rationale.sprint_bonus: Extra boost for sprint-sensitive opportunities when the roster is built to exploit them.
strength_weight_rationale.stage_hunter: How much the profile should value stage-hunting or sprinter-friendly stage-race signals.
strength_weight_rationale.time_trial: How much time-trial signals should influence team fit.

team_profile.team_fit_rationale: The multiplier is bounded as floor + range * team_fit_score, which keeps team fit as an adjustment rather than letting it overwhelm the historical opportunity anchor.
